news.title: FDA hits Newron’s phase 3 schizophrenia trial with clinical hold in US after patient death
news.snippet: The FDA has halted U.S. enrollment for Newron Pharmaceuticals’ phase 3 schizophrenia trial, following the death of a patient outside of the country.

news.title: AstraZeneca restarts £300M investment in UK, but Merck not budging
news.snippet: AstraZeneca has announced it will resume a £300 million investment program in the U.K., seven months after freezing the plans in frustration at national government drug pricing negotiations.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Vivacta snags $50M+ series A; Coultreon reels in $125M
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Teva inks $700M Emalex buyout to bag near-approval Tourette drug
news.snippet: Teva Pharmaceuticals has struck a deal to buy Emalex Biosciences for $700 million upfront, positioning the drugmaker to advance a Tourette syndrome candidate that is on the cusp of approval.

news.title: Rising costs push GE HealthCare to cut outlook as it restructures units and leadership
news.snippet: Investors sent GE HealthCare into the red Wednesday morning as the company revealed it was cutting its profit outlook while also making structural changes to its business and executive teams.

news.title: AstraZeneca scraps FLAP inhibitor after flunking phase 2 asthma trial
news.snippet: AstraZeneca has scrapped an asthma program after the FLAP inhibitor flunked a phase 2 trial.

news.title: Which blockbuster is GSK gunning for next? CEO Miels is looking to oncology
news.snippet: When it comes to GSK’s new dealmaking strategy of trying to outdo established blockbusters, CEO Luke Miels has told Fierce that oncology may offer the most tempting targets.

news.title: GSK walks away from $100M bet on Mersana's STING ADC, pauses mRNA bird flu shot program
news.snippet: GSK has finally called time on its pact with Mersana Therapeutics despite sinking $100 million to secure an option for an antibody-drug conjugate (ADC).

news.title: FDA flags concerns for AstraZeneca's camizestrant, Truqap ahead of advisory committee meeting
news.snippet: The FDA has released briefing documents detailing its concerns for AstraZeneca’s cancer drugs camizestrant and Truqap ahead of an upcoming advisory committee meeting, the first such gathering in about

news.title: FDA unveils plan for real-time review of clinical trial data, with AstraZeneca and Amgen already on board
news.snippet: The FDA today announced a new initiative to allow its reviewers to access information from clinical trials in real time, with two major industry players already taking part in a pilot program.

news.title: Protagonist opts for $475M in Takeda payouts instead of splitting US rusfertide profits
news.snippet: After mulling its options for the past few months, Protagonist Therapeutics has decided to pocket $475 million from Takeda rather than split the U.S. profits for a near-approval hematology asset.

news.title: AbbVie dips into boiling RAS waters with $1.45B biobucks deal that could end in acquisition
news.snippet: AbbVie has agreed to help finance a KRAS inhibitor from Kestrel Therapeutics in a deal that could hit up to $1.45 billion in value and end with AbbVie buying the company outright.

news.title: Incyte’s JAK inhibitor scores phase 3 vitiligo wins but can’t quite shake off Rinvoq
news.snippet: Incyte’s povorcitinib has scored a pair of phase 3 wins for a skin condition, although analysts noted the JAK inhibitor didn’t quite live up to AbbVie’s Rinvoq.

news.title: Erasca hits ‘home run’ with cancer data as analyst suggests stock drop prompted by patient death
news.snippet: Erasca has backed up bullish claims about its pan-RAS drug having a best-in-class profile, publishing phase 1 data that an analyst said reveal a “home run profile.”

news.title: Lilly pens $2.2B pact with Bezos-backed Profluent to work on recombinase-based gene editing
news.snippet: Eli Lilly’s latest attempt to strengthen its genetic medicine offering has seen the pharma team up with Profluent to develop AI-designed recombinases to address diseases with severe unmet needs.

news.title: AstraZeneca CEO's conservative MFN model excludes reference markets from forecast
news.snippet: As AstraZeneca braces for the impact of the U.S. “most favored nation” drug pricing policy, CEO Pascal Soriot suggests that a “very conservative” way to model the fallout would be removing the eight r

news.title: AbbVie outlines Skyrizi defense against new J&J plaque psoriasis rival Icotyde
news.snippet: Immunology med Skyrizi charted sales growth of 30.9% over 2026's first quarter, bringing in $4.48 billion as AbbVie's top earner.

news.title: With Austedo at helm, Teva's impressive innovative drug sales signal company's successful metamorphosis
news.snippet: While Teva Pharmaceutical’s multiyear growth streak under CEO Richard Francis showed signs of leveling off, the company still topped Wall Street estimates in 2026’s first quarter, buoyed by the impres

news.title: Regeneron's quarterly sales of Eylea drop below $1B for the first time in 8 years
news.snippet: As regulatory delays continue to plague Regeneron's Eylea franchise, quarterly sales for the eye disease medicine have dropped below $1 billion for the first time since the second quarter of 2018.

news.title: New GSK CEO’s first quarter boosted by Shingrix surge as Exdensur stumbles in switch trial
news.snippet: In GSK’s first quarter with Luke Miels as CEO, the company’s flagship shingles vaccine Shingrix set a new quarterly sales record while its closely watched asthma launch Exdensur showed “early signals”

news.title: Pfizer looks to jump start Elrexfio with topline win in second-line myeloma
news.snippet: With a new positive trial readout, the company is aiming to reach a broader set of patients with its multiple myeloma bispecific Elrexfio.

news.title: Chiesi lays out $1.9B to bolster rare disease offerings with KalVista buyout
news.snippet: As Ekterly nears the one-year anniversary of its approval, Chiesi Group is making moves to acquire the rare disease med and its developer KalVista.

news.title: AstraZeneca restarts £300M investment in UK, but Merck not budging
news.snippet: AstraZeneca has announced it will resume a £300 million investment program in the U.K., seven months after freezing the plans in frustration at national government drug pricing negotiations.

news.title: Novartis CEO calls for 'complete rethink' of Europe's drug pricing policies
news.snippet: Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan says that Europe needs a “complete rethink” on how it prices its drugs, warning that the entrance of new pharmaceuticals into its markets could be delayed.

news.title: Pfizer’s victory in delaying Vyndamax generics is mixed bag for BridgeBio: analysts
news.snippet: Pfizer now anticipates its Vyndamax sales to remain “relatively stable” from 2028 through mid-2031, it said.

news.title: FDA flags concerns for AstraZeneca's camizestrant, Truqap ahead of advisory committee meeting
news.snippet: The FDA has released briefing documents detailing its concerns for AstraZeneca’s cancer drugs camizestrant and Truqap ahead of an upcoming advisory committee meeting, the first such gathering in about

news.title: FDA turns up heat on Amgen, proposing to rescind approval of Tavneos
news.snippet: The FDA has told Amgen that it is proposing to withdraw the approval of the rare disease drug Tavneos. The FDA cited new information that indicates that data was "manipulated" to facilitate the a

news.title: With ‘lessons learned,’ Kite prepares to hit the ground running as next-gen CAR-T decision looms
news.snippet: After recalibrating its production strategy in the late 2010s to help meet the realities of the CAR-T market, Gilead Sciences’ Kite Pharma is preparing to hit the ground running with the potential app

news.title: Rocket sells priority review voucher for $180M after Kresladi gene therapy approval
news.snippet: Rocket Pharmaceuticals has offloaded its lucrative FDA rare pediatric disease priority review voucher, striking a $180 million sale that reflects the high market demand for a speedy FDA review.

news.title: AZ's Breztri nabs FDA asthma nod, adding fuel to blockbuster launch
news.snippet: After breaking through the blockbuster sales threshold in 2025, AstraZeneca’s three-in-one inhaler Breztri Aerosphere has passed another crucial milestone as it chips in on the British drugmaker’s goa

news.title: HHS appeals ruling that stalled many of Kennedy’s vaccine policy changes
news.snippet: The appeal is the latest twist in the closely watched lawsuit filed by the American Association of Pediatrics.

news.title: Infant formula largely safe from heavy metals, FDA finds
news.snippet: FDA sampled 312 major infant formula brands and found low or undetectable levels of pesticide residue, PFAS, heavy metals and phthalates.

news.title: STAT+: A patent win for Pfizer and BridgeBio
news.snippet: A change to FDA clinical trial data review, Rocket sells its priority review voucher, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about the FDA speeding up trials, a Supreme Court hearing on ‘skinny labels,’ and more
news.snippet: The FDA announced efforts to make clinical trials more efficient, starting by reviewing data in real time from trials conducted by AstraZeneca and Amgen

news.title: Opinion: STAT+: Did Kennedy just stack the deck on FDA oversight of peptides?
news.snippet: RFK Jr. had long signaled that he was going to do something big on peptides. Now the moment has arrived.

news.title: STAT+: AIDS group sues Trump administration over undisclosed agreement with Gilead
news.snippet: The AIDS advocacy group PrEP4All has sued the Trump administration over an undisclosed agreement with Gilead.

news.title: STAT+: FDA launches effort to speed up clinical trials, using AI
news.snippet: Monitoring trials in real time may help shorten the time interval between trial phases.

news.title: 11 cancers on the rise in young people - scientists find first clue why it's happening
news.snippet: Researchers stress that simple lifestyle changes can still significantly reduce the risk of cancer.

news.title: UK healthy life expectancy falls by two years in past decade
news.snippet: Poor housing, obesity and the effects of deprivation have been suggested as underlying cause.

news.title: Bird flu vaccine trial against potential pandemic strain begins
news.snippet: The jab targets the H5N1 flu strain which has caused devastating infections in bird populations worldwide, but has yet to spread between humans.

news.title: Pregnancy vaccine reduces baby hospital admissions for RSV by 80%
news.snippet: A study confirms the vaccine gives excellent protection for babies against life-threatening chest infections.

news.title: Rollout of Covid vaccines extraordinary feat - inquiry report
news.snippet: Covid vaccines saved hundreds of thousands of lives, but a small minority harmed need better support, says report.
